ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variant_external_ids" (
  "external_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external ID record */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external ID (e.g., dbSNP, ClinVar) */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the variant in the external source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_variants" (
  "variant_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association record */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_source_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each external ID record
Source of the external ID (e.g., dbSNP, ClinVar)
Identifier for the variant in the external source
Unique identifier for each data source
Unique identifier for the association record
